title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE AMPID ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN MATEO, PROVINCE OF RIZAL, TO VICENTE SANTIAGO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 22601 / 88 OG No. 25, 3890 (June 22, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7491, May 13, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE AMPID ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN MATEO, PROVINCE OF RIZAL, TO VICENTE SANTIAGO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Ampid Elementary School located in the Municipality of San Mateo, Province of Rizal, is hereby changed to Vicente Santiago Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 5, 1990 and December 11, 1991, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: May 13, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
